heroTitle: Manage Your Stock. Know Your Business.
heroSubtitle: A privacy-first stock management platform for investors and merchants — control branches, track inventory, and view performance in one unified dashboard.
featuresTitle: The Clear Way to Manage Your Stock.
featuresSubtitle: Simplify operations and gain total visibility with features designed to give investors confidence and merchants efficiency.
feature1Desc: From stock levels to item movement, you'll always know what's available, and where.
feature2Desc: Assign merchants and products to specific branches with complete clarity and flexibility.
feature3Desc: Generate clean, accurate reports that help investors understand performance at a glance.
howItWorksTitle: Three Steps to Your Most Organized Workflow
step1Desc: Sign up using your phone number and get started.
step2Desc: Add your team, locations, merchants, or deals.
step3Desc: View real-time data and monitor progress across branches.
testimonialsTitle: What our customers have to say about our product.
testimonial1: Before switching, we were juggling spreadsheets, WhatsApp chats, and scattered files. Now everything — locations, merchants, and deal statuses — is in one place.
testimonial2: As an investor managing multiple locations, keeping track of merchants and stock movements was always chaotic. This dashboard gives me real-time insights on everything.
ctaTagline: Over 100K+ Entrepreneurs, and business choose us
ctaTitle: Start Managing Your Stock With Confidence Today.
ctaDesc: Simplify stock tracking, empower your merchants, and gain real-time insights across all locations, all in one clean interface.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Baman Stock
faq1A: BamanStock is designed to help investors manage multiple merchants and locations from one centralized dashboard. Investors create locations (branches), assign merchants to those locations, and link specific stock items to each location.
faq2Q: Can merchants manage stock on their own?
faq2A: Yes, merchants can manage assigned location stock and view reports for their branches.
faq3Q: What is the purpose of locations in the system?
faq3A: Locations represent branches and let you track inventory and merchant activity separately for each site.
faq4Q: How secure is my data on BamanStock?
faq4A: Data is protected with secure authentication and role-based access, so each user only sees and manages what they are allowed to access.
faq5Q: Can I make changes later to different locations?
faq5A: Yes. You can update assignments, stock links, and operational details anytime as your business grows and processes evolve.
privacyNote: We are committed to protecting your privacy. We will never collect information about you without your explicit consent.
contactReceivedDesc: Thanks for reaching out! Our team will get back to you shortly.
